creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text: The sysutils/3dm package was nonreproducible in my recent test due (only) to differences in the pkg-message. One package reported "Visit https://current-master-job-06:888/" and the other "Visit https://current-master-job-22:888/". In the case of binary packages the build hostname is most likely not meaningful; this should probably be "Visit https://localhost:888/" or use example.org.
